reviews.comment:
Una de las dos a donde va toda la gente, y se hacen largas colas. Lo bueno es que la nafta de alto octanaje está detras y suele estar vacio

(Translated by Google)
One of the two stations where everyone goes, and there are long lines. The good thing is that the high-octane gasoline is behind it and it's usually empty.

reviews.comment:
Toda la estación está en estado regular  y es muy incomodo el sistema de pago, hay que dejar el auto estacionado donde se pueda y bajarse a pagar en una oficina.

(Translated by Google)
The entire station is in fair condition and the payment system is very inconvenient; you have to leave your car parked wherever you can and get out to pay at an office.
